title: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form and other obscure games
display_title: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form and other obscure games
wikitext:
[]: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form, and other obscure games             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Jan 21, 2020 9:53 pm So I have recently found this channel here: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJZDCh ... jjqNctdLSg It has videos of several of the more obscure Eva games. In particular, it adapts several Eva games into video form, and it pretty much makes them look like "extra" episodes. For instance, this compilation of the Sega Saturn 1st Impression game , which totals longer than an anime episode. The animation is of lower quality, but it could still pass for an actual Eva episode This is the one that has the (in)famous Shinji/Hikari kiss. Sure would be nice to have it translated for everyone's enjoyment. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VVdOIwMPrFQ&app=desktop (how do I embed YT videos?)

[]: Re: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form, and other obscure games             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Apr 28, 2020 7:10 pm thanks friend!

[]: Re: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form, and other obscure games             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Apr 29, 2020 4:13 am FelipeFritschF wrote: (how do I embed YT videos?)

Article: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form and other obscure games
[]: Sega Saturn game compiled into video form, and other obscure games             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Tue Jan 21, 2020 9:53 pm So I have recently found this channel here: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJZDCh ... jjqNctdLSg It has videos of several of the more obscure Eva games. In particular, it adapts several Eva games into video form, and it pretty much makes them look like "extra" episodes. For instance, this compilation of the Sega Saturn 1st Impression game , which totals longer than an anime episode. The animation is of lower quality, but it could still pass for an actual Eva episode This is the one that has the (in)famous Shinji/Hikari kiss. Sure would be nice to have it translated for everyone's enjoyment. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VVdOIwMPrFQ&app=desktop (how do I embed YT videos?)
